description_long: This is a pixelated, military-style single-propeller airplane with a green camouflage paint scheme and red insignia on its wings. The fuselage is streamlined with a glass canopy cockpit situated near the front, featuring a multi-panel window design. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each bearing a red circular marking, and the tail section includes a vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The propeller is wooden and mounted at the nose, with a black engine cowling behind it. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel. The overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era fighter aircraft, with blocky, voxel-style geometry.
description: A green, pixelated single-propeller military airplane with red insignia, a glass canopy cockpit, and fixed landing gear. The design is reminiscent of a WWII fighter with a streamlined fuselage and conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, glass canopy, wooden propeller, and red insignia on the wing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail structure, both wings with red insignia, and the fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit, propeller, and tail wheel, with clear visibility of the wing insignia.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the propeller, engine cowling, cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing layout.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets; classic monoplane layout.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel glass canopy, likely single-seat.
